title: Gift Card Acceptance
description: Which retailers in France accept multi‑brand gift cards such as Illinocado, CADO, UpCadhoc, and Galeries Lafayette e‑gift cards?
narrative: The user wants a comprehensive list of physical stores and online shops in France where these multi‑brand gift cards can be used. Relevant documents must mention the specific card networks, their partner merchants, any category or location restrictions, and whether the cards are usable both in‑store and online. Answers that only describe the card features without naming accepted merchants are not relevant.

title: Mild Lamb Tajine
description: How can I adjust a traditional lamb tajine recipe to make it less spicy while retaining its authentic flavor?
narrative: The user wants a lamb tajine that is suitable for low‑spice or heat‑sensitive eaters. Relevant documents should describe ways to reduce or substitute hot ingredients (e.g., chilli, ras el hanout) and suggest alternative spice balances, cooking techniques, or ingredient swaps that keep the dish recognizably Moroccan. Recipes, tips, or user comments that specifically address lowering heat, using milder chilies, adjusting quantities, or offering flavor‑preserving modifications are considered relevant.

title: Lotus Elise Search
description: Which used Lotus Elise cars are listed for sale in France for under €30,000, with mileage below 50,000 km, manual transmission, model year 2000 or later, and documented vehicle‑history information?
narrative: The user intends to buy a used Lotus Elise and needs listings that satisfy multiple constraints: price ≤ €30,000, odometer reading ≤ 50,000 km, manual gearbox, year ≥ 2000, and availability of a reliable history report (e.g., Histovec). Relevant results are those that mention a Lotus Elise ad containing these specifications and a reference to vehicle‑history verification.

title: Veal Paupiette Variations
description: What are the different regional and contemporary variations of veal paupiette recipes, including ingredient substitutions, sauces, and cooking techniques?
narrative: The user wants a comprehensive overview of veal paupiette recipes that highlights both classic French preparations and modern twists. Relevant content should detail specific ingredient choices (e.g., mushrooms, cream, white wine, pesto, prunes), sauce types (tomato, cream, balsamic, wine‑based), cooking methods (oven‑baked, stovetop braise, simmering), preparation steps, cooking times, and serving suggestions. Documents that provide concrete recipes, variations, and practical tips satisfy the need; generic mentions without recipe details do not.

title: Legal Tint Limits
description: What are the current French regulations on the minimum visible light transmission (VLT) allowed for automotive window tint films?
narrative: The user seeks authoritative information about French law governing automotive window tinting, specifically the required VLT percentages, any distinctions between front and rear windows, and the effective date of the rule. Relevant documents must explicitly state the legal threshold (e.g., TLV ≥ 70 % for front side glazing), mention that rear windows are unrestricted, reference the law’s enactment (e.g., January 1 2017), and clarify that the rule applies to self‑applied solar films but not to windshields. Documents that only discuss product benefits, installation tips, or unrelated car‑care advice are not relevant.

title: Small Boat Collection
description: What clothing items, styles, and materials are featured in Petit Bateau’s ‘Small Boat’ women’s collection, and where can those pieces be purchased?
narrative: The user is seeking a comprehensive overview of Petit Bateau’s Small Boat line for women, including the types of garments (e.g., dresses, sweaters, T‑shirts, jackets, accessories), the design themes, fabric details (e.g., organic cotton, waterproof wax), and seasonal variations. Relevant documents should describe the collection’s aesthetic, list specific product categories, and provide information on purchase channels such as the official website, online shop, and physical store locations or authorized retailers.

title: Renault Employee Pricing
description: How can a non‑employee obtain a new Renault at the same price that Renault staff receive?
narrative: The user is looking for ways to purchase or lease a new Renault vehicle at employee‑level discounts without actually being a Renault employee. Relevant information includes services such as Elite‑Auto that negotiate dealer prices to match or beat employee pricing, details of discount percentages, lease‑with‑option‑to‑purchase (LOA) terms, any guarantees or satisfaction policies, and comparisons between buying through an employee channel versus a third‑party agent. Documents that describe the discount ranges (e.g., up to 42.5%), the process of selecting a model, customization options, and the financial conditions of the LOA are considered relevant.

title: War School Purchase
description: What are the steps, options, and requirements for ordering a book (print or ebook) from the School of War, including payment methods and delivery timelines?
narrative: The user wants a complete guide to buying a School of War publication: how to select format (ebook vs paper), price ranges, create an account, choose payment (credit card or bank transfer via Société Générale), apply any promo codes, understand shipping methods (Post Office, Chronopost), expected delivery times (including print‑on‑demand delays), and relevant site policies such as cookies and privacy. Documents describing ordering flow, format options, pricing, payment processing, delivery details, and account management are considered relevant.

title: Reloading ARE Rights
description: What are the eligibility criteria and procedure for reloading unemployment benefits (ARE) in France after returning to work?
narrative: The user seeks a detailed, step‑by‑step explanation of how a jobseeker can have their ARE (allocation d'aide au retour à l'emploi) reloaded after a period of employment. Relevant information must cover the required amount of work (e.g., 910 hours or 130 days), the deadline for requesting a reload before the lapse period expires, differences between the pre‑ and post‑1 Nov 2019 regulations, the impact of voluntary versus involuntary termination, the calculation of remaining balance, the optional right of option, and any formal actions the claimant must take (e.g., providing employer certificates, notifying Pôle Emploi). Documents that describe these conditions, timelines, calculations, and procedural steps are considered relevant.

title: AXA login recovery
description: How can I recover or reset my password for the AXA client area and be sure I’m using the correct portal for insurance versus banking services?
narrative: The user wants step‑by‑step instructions for retrieving a forgotten AXA client‑area password, including where to locate the “Forgot password” link, how to verify the HTTPS address, and how to distinguish between the insurance site (client.axa.fr) and the banking site (axabanque.fr). Relevant documents must describe the login process, password reset procedures, and portal differentiation; anything unrelated to AXA’s online client spaces or password recovery is not relevant.

title: EV Total Cost France
description: What is the total cost of owning a battery‑electric car in France, accounting for purchase price, government subsidies, registration tax exemptions, and battery warranty terms?
narrative: The user is researching the overall financial impact of buying an electric vehicle in France. Relevant documents must provide concrete price ranges for electric models, detail the various purchase aids (green bonus, conversion allowance, retrofit premium, used‑EV premium, regional aids), explain registration‑tax exemptions, and describe battery guarantee periods and capacity thresholds. Sources that also compare these costs to equivalent internal‑combustion vehicles, mention charging time implications, and outline eligibility criteria (income limits, vehicle age, CO2 limits) are considered relevant.

title: Infected Tomato Safety
description: Are tomatoes (and potatoes) showing symptoms of downy mildew or late blight safe to eat, store, or can for later use?
narrative: The user seeks trustworthy information about the health risks and practical guidelines for consuming, storing, or canning tomatoes and potatoes infected with downy mildew or late blight. Relevant content should address expert opinions on food safety, USDA canning recommendations, the edibility of affected versus unaffected parts, any known studies on toxicity, and advice on discarding or treating the produce. Documents that discuss safety assessments, taste/quality impact, and recommended handling practices are considered relevant.

title: Pole Shift Prophecies
description: What modern prophecies predict an Earth pole shift and associated cataclysms, and how do they differ across sources?
narrative: The user wants to collect and compare predictions of an imminent planetary pole shift found in contemporary prophetic narratives. Relevant material should include mentions of the pole shift in the writings of Padre Pio, Nibiru theories, Hopi legends (blue/red Katchina), the three days of darkness, and New Age channelers such as Monique Mathieu. Documents should provide claimed dates, described mechanisms (e.g., a massive celestial body causing an eclipse or crust tipping), linked phenomena (volcanic eruptions, meteor showers, global darkness), and any commentary on the credibility or context of each source.

title: French Spaceballs streaming
description: Where can I watch the French-language version of 'La Folle Histoire de l'Espace' (Spaceballs) online safely and legally?
narrative: The user is looking for an online source that provides the full movie in French (VF) with good quality, preferably without requiring unnecessary personal data collection or a paid subscription. Relevant information includes legitimate streaming platforms, official download options, or reputable free‑legal services that host the film. Documents that list streaming keywords, describe the film, or detail privacy policies of streaming sites are useful for assessing safety and legality. Results that point to piracy sites, incomplete clips, or pages that only discuss privacy policies without offering the film are non‑relevant.

title: Season 6 Outlook
description: Will Le Bureau des Légendes (The Office of Legends) be renewed for a sixth season, and what are the confirmed plans for its continuation or possible reboot?
narrative: The user is looking for authoritative, up‑to‑date information about the future of the French espionage series Le Bureau des Légendes, specifically whether a sixth season is officially confirmed, any announced production timetable, and any statements from key figures such as creator Eric Rochant, lead actor Mathieu Kassovitz, or Canal+. Relevant results should include official network press releases, interviews, credible news articles, and confirmed statements about renewal, cancellation, or reboot plans. Rumors or fan speculation without source attribution are not sufficient; the answer must be grounded in documented sources.

title: Prevail Conjugation
description: What are the full conjugation patterns, meanings, and typical usages of the French verb prévaloir (to prevail) across different tenses and moods?
narrative: The user is seeking a comprehensive overview of the verb prévaloir, including detailed conjugation tables for indicative, conditional, subjunctive, and compound tenses, as well as explanations of its intransitive nature, semantic nuances, and example sentences from literary sources. Relevant documents should provide full verb forms, grammatical notes, definitions, synonyms, and illustrative usage in context.

title: Ethiopia Episodes
description: Which episodes of the French TV series “Rendez‑vous en terre inconnu” were filmed in Ethiopia and who were the celebrity participants?
narrative: The user is looking for a curated list of all program installments that took place in Ethiopia. Relevant documents must mention Ethiopia as the destination, provide the episode number or year, and identify the celebrity (or presenter) who traveled there. Information about broadcast date, channel, and any related follow‑up shows (e.g., Retour en terre inconnu) is also useful. Documents that only discuss other countries, general program format, or presenter biographies without Ethiopian episodes are not relevant.

title: Truffle Purée Diarrhea
description: Is Picard’s frozen black truffle potato crush safe and appropriate to consume during an acute episode of diarrhea?
narrative: The user is recovering from diarrhea and wants to know whether the Black Truffle Potato Crush (a frozen puree containing potatoes, cream, butter, truffle, and various seasonings) fits the dietary guidelines for diarrheal illness. Relevant criteria include low fiber, low fat, minimal dairy, and easy digestibility. The answer should consider the product’s ingredient list, nutritional values, and preparation instructions, and compare them with the recommendations from the health article that advises cooked low‑fiber vegetables, plain starches (rice, white pasta, steamed potatoes), lean proteins, limited dairy, and low‑fat foods. Documents describing the product and the health‑related food recommendations are both relevant.

title: Paris Event Venue
description: Where can I rent a large space in Paris suitable for hosting events or conferences?
narrative: The user is looking for venues in Paris that offer sizable rooms for events, including details such as total area, capacity, past event statistics, location, and contact information. Relevant documents should mention rental options, event spaces, and logistical specifics (e.g., 3000 m², number of events hosted, visitor counts, phone number).

title: Green Electricity Comparison
description: What are the key differences between French green electricity providers regarding price, contract flexibility, and renewable source verification?
narrative: The user wants a side‑by‑side analysis of the green electricity offers described in the documents (Urban Solar Energy, E.Leclerc Energies, Alpiq, ekWateur). Relevant documents must address pricing (kWh rates, subscription fees), contract terms (duration, commitment, ability to switch, off‑peak options), and how each supplier guarantees the renewable origin of the electricity (e.g., Guarantees of Origin, local solar integration, self‑consumption options). Documents that only mention contact details or unrelated services are not relevant.

title: Kia EV6 Pricing
description: What is the current retail price of the Kia EV6 in France, including any applicable government bonuses and typical dealer add‑ons?
narrative: The user is looking for the most recent, location‑specific price information for the Kia EV6 electric crossover as sold in France. Relevant documents must contain the base MSRP, mention of the ecological or electric vehicle bonus, and any typical extra costs such as destination fees, taxes, or dealer-installed options that affect the final purchase price. Sources that only list older price figures, omit the French market context, or discuss unrelated Kia models (e.g., Niro, Sportage) are not relevant.

title: Gallic Ancestry
description: What historical and archaeological evidence supports the claim that modern French people are descended from the ancient Gauls?
narrative: The user wants a comprehensive overview of the origins and validity of the notion that the French are "descendants of the Gauls." Relevant material should cover the original use of the term "Gallic" by Julius Caesar, the composition of Gaulish tribes and their Celtic links, linguistic and archaeological evidence of continuity, and the historiographic evolution of the idea—from Roman accounts through medieval narratives to 19th‑century school textbooks and modern French nationalism. Documents that explain how this myth was constructed, promoted, and contested are considered relevant.

title: Faro Rental Comparison
description: What are the cheapest car rental options at Faro Airport that include free cancellation, air‑conditioning, and a child‑seat for a 7‑day summer trip?
narrative: The user is planning a week‑long summer vacation in the Algarve and wants to rent a car at Faro Airport. They are looking for the lowest‑priced rentals that also offer free cancellation, air‑conditioning (important in hot weather), and the option to add a child‑seat. Relevant documents should mention price per day, cancellation policy, available vehicle features (especially air‑conditioning and child‑seat), and the names of agencies operating at Faro Airport. Comparisons of multiple agencies, user reviews about price and service quality, and any age‑related surcharges are also pertinent.

title: Nantes South Car Rental
description: What are the rental rates, vehicle options, opening hours, and cancellation policies for the Europcar agency at Nantes South Station, and how do they compare to other nearby agencies?
narrative: The user wants a comprehensive overview of car (and utility) rental services at the Nantes South Station area, focusing on Europcar but also interested in comparable details from other agencies such as SIXT and ADA. Relevant information must include the agency’s address, opening hours, contact phone number, available vehicle categories and specific models, average daily price (e.g., €45 per day for a standard car), fuel and deposit requirements, cancellation rules (free up to 48 hours before pick‑up), loyalty benefits, and any special services (24/7 pick‑up, one‑way rentals, truck capacities). For comparison, equivalent details for nearby agencies (e.g., SIXT at Nantes Atlantic Airport or ADA at Nantes Gare Sud) should be provided. Documents that mention these attributes, pricing tables, service descriptions, or policies are deemed relevant.

title: Resistant Potato Variety
description: Which potato varieties provide the highest resistance to the most common diseases and pests?
narrative: The user is seeking a concise list of potato cultivars that are known for strong resistance to major potato problems such as downy mildew, late blight, common scab, Colorado beetle, and wireworms. Relevant documents should mention specific varieties (e.g., Samba, Charlotte, Rose de France, Bernadette) and describe the diseases/pests they resist, as well as any agronomic notes (e.g., yield, cooking qualities) that help the user decide which resistant variety to plant.

title: Beaujolais Crus Guide
description: What are the characteristic flavor profiles, optimal drinking windows, and recommended food pairings for each of the ten Beaujolais crus?
narrative: The user is seeking a comprehensive overview of the ten Beaujolais crus (Morgon, Régnié, Moulin‑à‑Vent, Côte de Brouilly, Brouilly, Juliénas, Saint‑Amour, Chénas, Chiroubles, Fleurie). Relevant documents must describe each cru’s typical aromas and taste notes, indicate whether the wine is best enjoyed young or can benefit from aging, and suggest appropriate dishes or ingredients that complement its style. Any source that provides tasting tips, pairing ideas, or aging recommendations for these specific appellations satisfies the query.

title: Boat Shoe Comparison
description: How do André's and TBS's men's boat shoes differ in design, materials, price range, and purchase options in France?
narrative: The user is looking for a side‑by‑side comparison of the boat shoe offerings from the French retailer André and the brand TBS. Relevant documents should provide details on each brand's models (e.g., styles, colors, leather vs. nubuck), technical features (e.g., slip‑resistant soles, waterproofing), price points, available sizes, promotional offers (such as student discounts for André or free shipping for TBS), and where the shoes can be bought (online store, physical boutiques, delivery zones). Documents that mention only unrelated product lines, women's or children's shoes, or accessories without reference to men's boat shoes are not relevant.

title: Renault 7‑Seat EV
description: Which Renault electric vehicle provides at least seven seats while staying under €60,000?
narrative: The user intends to buy a fully electric Renault that can accommodate a large family. Relevant results must identify a model with seating capacity of seven or more, be powered solely by an electric drivetrain, and have a listed price at or below €60,000 in France. Any vehicle that is hybrid, plug‑in hybrid, diesel, or exceeds the price ceiling is not relevant.

title: Budget Corfu Rental
description: What are the cheapest car rental options in Corfu that include unlimited mileage and free cancellation?
narrative: The user is planning a trip to Corfu and wants to rent a vehicle at the lowest possible price. Relevant results must mention rental agencies or intermediaries offering the lowest daily rates for any car category, explicitly state that the offer includes unlimited mileage and free cancellation (or the ability to cancel without fee). Information about location (airport or city centre) is useful but not required. Documents that only list prices without cancellation or mileage terms, or that focus solely on premium or luxury cars, are not considered relevant.

title: Free Baby‑Seat Rentals
description: Which car‑rental agencies on Réunion Island offer complimentary child‑seat equipment and unlimited mileage?
narrative: The user is planning a family trip to Réunion and wants to rent a vehicle that includes a free baby/child seat (or similar child‑safety equipment) without extra charge, as well as unlimited mileage and comprehensive insurance. Relevant documents must mention these specific services (free baby seat, unlimited km, all‑risk insurance) and be associated with a Réunion‑based agency (e.g., Saint‑Leu, Saint‑Denis, or other local locations). Documents that only list vehicle categories or generic pricing without these features are not relevant.

title: Used Electric SUVs
description: What used electric sport‑utility vehicles are listed for sale in Switzerland on AutoScout24 with prices under 50,000 CHF?
narrative: The user is seeking current AutoScout24 listings of pre‑owned electric SUVs (or similar Kombi/crossover models) available in the Swiss market, restricting results to a maximum price of 50,000 Swiss francs. Relevant documents must mention used cars, electric powertrains, SUV/Kombi body styles, price ranges, and the Swiss location. Entries lacking an electric drivetrain, not being an SUV/Kombi, or priced above the stated ceiling are not relevant.

title: Mad Max Compensation
description: What are the legal compensation mechanisms for road‑accident injuries in reality, and how do they compare to the injuries portrayed in the film *Mad Max*?
narrative: The user is researching the realism of injury compensation depicted in *Mad Max* by seeking information on (1) the specific injuries and fatalities shown in the movie and (2) the French/European Badinter law and related road‑accident compensation schemes, including disability percentages, medical assessments, and monetary scales. Relevant documents must describe the film’s plot injuries and the legal/medical framework for calculating compensation after road accidents.

title: Accessible Event Transport
description: What transportation options are available for people with reduced mobility to attend events at the Arkéa Arena in Bordeaux, and what are their costs and booking procedures?
narrative: The user is looking for information on accessible travel services to the Arkéa Arena, including vehicles equipped for people with disabilities, availability of a driver, pricing (e.g., the cited €450 per day car hire), how to reserve these services, and any contact details or special accommodations offered by the venue. Relevant documents should mention driver‑provided cars, accessibility provisions at the arena, and contact numbers for reservations.

title: Rural Women Letters
description: Locate the original letters sent by women farmers to Menie Grégoire during her radio program (1969‑1976).
narrative: The user is a researcher studying the voices and everyday lives of French women farmers in the early 1970s. They need primary‑source correspondence that the women wrote to Menie Grégoire, preserved in the Menie Grégoire fonds (collection 66J) at the Indre‑et‑Loire Departmental Archives. Relevant results are the letters themselves, catalog entries or finding aids that describe these letters, digitized images or transcripts, and contextual information about the radio show that explains why the letters were collected. Materials unrelated to this correspondence (e.g., carnival postcards, job exchange listings, or general archive news) are not relevant.

title: Energy Bill Dispute Timeline
description: What are the legal time limits and procedural steps for contesting an electricity or natural gas bill in France?
narrative: The user seeks a clear explanation of the statutes of limitation (e.g., 2 years for professionals under Article L.218‑2 and 5 years for consumers under Article 2224), the impact of mediation on these periods, and the required escalation path (customer service → consumer service → national ombudsman). Relevant documents must describe these deadlines, the escalation hierarchy, required contact details, and how the National Energy Ombudsman intervenes when the supplier does not respond within the prescribed time frames.

title: Graphic Tablet Comparison
description: Which graphic tablets under €300 offer the best performance for professional drawing and sketching?
narrative: The user is looking for a concise comparison of graphic tablets priced at 300 euros or less, focusing on features relevant to professional artists such as pen pressure sensitivity, screen size, resolution, and compatibility with design software. Documents that list product specifications, pricing, promotional offers, or buying guides for graphic tablets and related accessories are relevant, while generic laptop or tablet listings without a focus on pen input are not.

title: Silver Print Restoration
description: What historical silver printing processes and modern software tools can be used to restore and emulate silver gelatin photographs?
narrative: The user is seeking information that combines the history of silver gelatin printing techniques (e.g., daguerreotype, calotype, wet/dry collodion, silver gelatin emulsion) with contemporary digital solutions such as DxO FilmPack that replicate or enhance the look of silver prints. Relevant material should describe the chemical steps, key milestones, and the capabilities of current image‑processing software for noise‑free, color‑accurate restoration of silver photographs.

title: Leek Quiche with Lardons
description: What is a complete recipe for a leek and lardons quiche, including ingredients, step‑by‑step instructions, cooking time, temperature, and tips for freezing leftovers?
narrative: The user is looking for a full cooking guide that covers all aspects of making a leek quiche with lardons. Relevant documents must provide a detailed ingredient list (leeks, lardons, eggs, milk, cream, flour or pastry dough, Gruyère cheese, etc.), precise preparation steps (steaming leeks, sautéing lardons, mixing batter, assembling in a pie pan), cooking parameters (oven temperature, baking duration), and optional variations (using broken dough, adding extra vegetables, choosing alternative cheeses). Additionally, the user wants practical advice on how to freeze the cooked quiche or its components for future meals. Any recipe that lacks one of these elements—especially storage recommendations—should be considered non‑relevant.

title: Game Points Policy
description: What is the points system for recreational games on the educational software, and which games (if any) award points?
narrative: The user wants to know how points are assigned for the recreational (flash) games on the educational platform, including whether any of these games contribute to the overall ranking, what the rules are (e.g., points are not awarded during contests, or only certain games give stars), and any age‑related restrictions. Relevant documents are those that discuss the points system, contest resets, statements that recreational games do not earn points, exceptions where stars are earned, and user inquiries about earning points for recreational games.

title: Mobility Assistance Eligibility
description: What are the eligibility criteria and application steps for obtaining Pôle emploi mobility assistance for a job interview or training?
narrative: The user is looking for detailed information on who can receive mobility aid from Pôle emploi, the specific conditions (e.g., distance, type of contract, benefit status), the types of expenses covered, the monetary limits, and the exact procedure for applying (including required documents and deadlines). Documents that explain eligibility rules, application deadlines, expense reimbursement limits, and the role of the job centre advisor are considered relevant.

title: SFR Client Access
description: How do I log in to the SFR client area and view or download my LICO invoices?
narrative: The user wants step‑by‑step instructions for accessing the SFR customer portal, including entering the user ID and password, recovering a forgotten password, navigating to the invoice section, and downloading or printing LICO bills; relevant documents are those that describe the login process, password reset procedures, and how to locate and manage invoices within the SFR client space.

title: Oil Lamp Wick Selection
description: What type of oil lamp wick (cotton vs. fiberglass) is best for outdoor camping lamps in terms of durability, flame quality, and fuel compatibility?
narrative: The user is seeking advice on choosing the most suitable wick for an oil lamp used outdoors, especially while camping. Relevant information should compare cotton and fiberglass wicks, describe their material properties, recommended dimensions, compatibility with different oils, expected lifespan, and how they affect flame size and stability. Instructions for installing or replacing the wick and any performance tips for outdoor conditions are also pertinent.

title: Madeira Rental Prices
description: What are the typical daily rates for renting a car in Madeira, how do they vary by month, and which companies provide the best value for a week‑long stay?
narrative: The user is planning a week‑long vacation on Madeira and needs detailed pricing information for car rentals. Relevant documents should include average daily costs broken down by month, seasonal trends showing the cheapest and most popular periods, and comparisons of major rental providers (e.g., Hertz, Avis, Goldcar, Budget, Atlantic). The answer should also note insurance options (full coverage, deductible costs), age restrictions, mileage limits, and any extra fees such as airport surcharges or delivery charges. Documents that discuss discounts, promotional codes, and tips for picking up the vehicle at the airport are also pertinent. Only sources that contain concrete price figures, month‑by‑month trends, or clear comparisons of providers and coverage options satisfy the relevance criteria.

title: Sprouted New Potatoes
description: What are the safety, storage, and cooking guidelines for early (new) potatoes that have begun to sprout?
narrative: The user is looking for comprehensive advice on handling sprouted early or "new" potatoes. Relevant information should cover the toxicology of potato sprouts (solanine risk), recommended methods for removing sprouts and green parts, optimal storage conditions to prevent further sprouting, and suitable cooking techniques (e.g., rissolée, oven‑roasting, sautéing) that preserve the delicate texture and flavor of new potatoes. Documents that discuss sprouted potatoes, early‑potato characteristics, storage temperature and humidity, and recipes or cooking tips for new potatoes are all considered relevant.

title: Back-to-Work Bonus Eligibility
description: What are the current eligibility criteria and application steps for the French return‑to‑work bonus (Prime de retour à l'emploi) for RSA or SSA beneficiaries?
narrative: The user is seeking detailed guidance on whether they qualify for the back‑to‑work (return‑to‑work) bonus and how to claim it. Relevant documents must describe the required benefit status (RSA, SSA, etc.), minimum work duration (e.g., four consecutive months or special cases for DDA), contract type and minimum hours (e.g., at least 78 h per month, CDI/CDD of six months), timing of payment, required documentation (contract, pay slips), and any recent changes to the scheme (discontinuation dates, departmental variations such as APRE). Documents that address these eligibility rules, procedural instructions, and up‑to‑date policy status are considered relevant.
